creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-01-12 16:38:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/p5-Net-DNSBL-Statistics Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Net::DNSBL::Statistics is the Perl module that collects statistics on the
  interrogation success for a list of IP addresses against a list of DNSBL's.
  The module is used to implement the reproting script dnsblstat.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-DNSBL-Statistics/
  
  PR:             ports/119424
  Submitted by:   Jin-Shan Tseng <tjs at cdpa.nsysu.edu.tw>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.87      +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/dns/p5-Net-DNSBL-Statistics/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/dns/p5-Net-DNSBL-Statistics/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/dns/p5-Net-DNSBL-Statistics/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/dns/p5-Net-DNSBL-Statistics/pkg-plist (new)
